rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE 2002 BERG FINNEGAN FAMILY TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Record
rulings.Rulings: Successor Trustee Milton Katz's Motion to Seal Record is DENIED. Mr. Katz has not made the requisite showing under CRC Rule 2.550(d) and the governing case law. He has failed to show that Ms. Berg's status as an elected official and the potential for negative publicity to City College of San Francisco override the public's interest in access to court records. Mr. Katz's counsel shall submit the proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling shall notify the court and any other relevant parties no later than May 13, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.
